concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 论文明确列出4条假设，包括雪道必须沿山脊、USGS数据代表性强、外地块不建雪道、滑雪者出发间隔10秒，并逐条给出合理性论证。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Assumption 1: Ski slopes must be placed on ridges primarily... Justification: Skiers are only safe if they are sliding down a slope...

concepts_used.title: 常用图表类型及选择指南
concepts_used.how_used: 利用QGIS将地形坡度分为0-6%、6-25%、25-40%、40-100%四个等级，用不同颜色渲染生成坡度分级图，用于识别雪道难度。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We used QGIS software to model the property and its surrounding land as a colored image in which the color of each pixel was determined by its grade and which of the following ranges it lied in: 0-6%, 6-25%, 25-40%, and 40-100%.

concepts_used.title: 梯度与方向导数
concepts_used.how_used: 利用梯度向量场计算地形的最陡下降方向（fall line），作为雪道设计的基础，确保雪道沿梯度方向延伸。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: used gradient vector fields and Mathematica’s morphological image processing capabilities to mathematically determine the locations of 'fall lines'

concepts_used.title: 元胞自动机
concepts_used.how_used: 在NetLogo中构建基于智能体的模型，模拟滑雪者速度随机变化和缆车分布，输出缆车等待时间和雪道上实时人数，用于优化缆车数量（26条）和分布（5:10:11）。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: created a computational agent-based model in NetLogo which allowed us to manipulate variables and test responses of our resort to stochastic variations in skier speed and lift distribution.

concepts_used.title: 加权求和评价
concepts_used.how_used: 构建综合评价指标，包含三个因子：每缆车土地面积、每缆车雪道数、雪道难度分布，通过百分比差异计算各因子得分，相乘后乘以100得到总分，用于与其他北美度假村对比。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We developed a metric which gave scores for each of these characteristics based on percent difference... The total rating was determined by multiplying these scores together and multiplying that value by 100.

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 通过运行基于智能体的流域分析（SURFER）模拟fall lines，视觉检查平坦区域，验证模型对地形变化的稳定性。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: The robustness and stability of our model was determined by running an agent-based watershed analysis within SURFER to simulate fall lines.

concepts_used.title: 地理信息可视化
concepts_used.how_used: 制作太阳朝向地图，将北向坡标红、南向坡标蓝，用于排除南向坡（易融雪结冰），结合坡度图和fall line图筛选最佳雪道。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: The solar aspect maps the location of the sun in relation to slopes and ridges. Slopes facing north were colored red, and slopes facing south were colored blue.

concepts_used.title: 论文整体结构（IMRaD 格式）
concepts_used.how_used: 论文采用IMRaD结构：摘要（Summary Sheet）、引言（Introduction）、假设（Assumptions）、建模（Model）、求解（Results）、评价（Metric）、灵敏度（Robustness）、结论（Conclusion），并附有致谢信。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Introduction and Restatement of Problem... Assumptions and Justifications... Model... Results... Metric... Robustness... Conclusion
